about.bio: 堅牢なロジックと流動的なデザインのギャップを埋め、没入型のデジタル体験を作成します。データベースからピクセルまで、完全なソリューションを提供します。

Highly-optimized full-stack news portal designed with a flexible architecture to rapidly deliver Server-Side Rendered content globally.

High-performance Enterprise B2G SaaS powered by Laravel Octane, handling complex public procurement workflows with in-memory state and zero latency.
Advanced virtual assistant driven by AI and native RAG, capable of querying complex legal contexts and analyzing proprietary files via real-time Vector Search.
Automated pipeline that reduced public document generation from months to minutes using asynchronous background queues and heavy processing workflows.
Deep refactoring of a legacy government system, eliminating critical Race Conditions and stabilizing an obsolete state-machine architecture with RxJS.
Semantic structuring implementation with advanced responsive layouts, applying modern CSS Grid and Flexbox techniques for true-to-design fidelity.
Pure JS interactive narrative engine, mutating the DOM in real-time based on complex player decisions and branching story states dynamically.
